LanguageData.Ammo_12mmsubsonicRailgun_SabotOE.label: 12mm subsonic Railgun cartridge (Sabot:OE)
LanguageData.Ammo_12mmsubsonicRailgun_SabotOE.descrip: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for high calibar subsonic railguns.
LanguageData.Bullet_12mmsubsonicRailgun_SabotOE.label: 12mm subsonic Railgun bullet (Sabot:OE)
